title.en: Scatterplot from joined dataframe (transect vs station or waterbody vs station)

description.en: Reads a joined CSV (with year/month/day/value_x/value_y and optional lat/lon) and generates a scatterplot PNG. Spatial filtering is either by latitude range OR by waterbody polygons.

joined_csv.title: joined_csv
joined_csv.description: Path (inside container mount) or URL to joined CSV (output from join process).

waterbodies_shp.title: waterbodies_shp
waterbodies_shp.description: Optional path to waterbodies shapefile readable by sf::st_read(). Use NULL or omit if not used.

waterbody_ids.title: waterbody_ids
waterbody_ids.description: Optional list of waterbody IDs/names to keep (must match waterbody_id_col). Required if waterbodies_shp is provided.

waterbody_id_col.title: waterbody_id_col
waterbody_id_col.description: Optional column name in waterbodies shapefile that contains IDs/names. Required if waterbodies_shp is provided.

lat_min.title: lat_min
lat_min.description: Minimum latitude for transect filtering. Required if waterbodies_shp is not provided.

lat_max.title: lat_max
lat_max.description: Maximum latitude for transect filtering. Required if waterbodies_shp is not provided.
